info.name: MX100 Job Portal API
info.description:
Koperasi Nusantara — IT Development Division  
Positive & Negative Testing per Actor

**Actors:**

- Employer: membuat & mengelola job, melihat CV pelamar
    
- Freelancer: browse job, apply CV, lihat lamaran sendiri

item.name: Setup Awal - Register & Login Semua Aktor

response.name: [Setup] Register Employer 1
[Setup] Register Employer 2 (untuk test isolasi ownership)
[Setup] Register Freelancer 1
[Setup] Register Freelancer 2 (untuk test duplikat apply)
[Setup] Register Freelancer 2 (untuk test isolasi freelance)

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Backend Developer Laravel TESTING SAJA",
  "description": "Kami mencari backend developer berpengalaman dalam Laravel dan PostgreSQL untuk bergabung dengan tim kami.",
  "requirements": "Minimal 2 tahun pengalaman, menguasai Laravel, Git, REST API.",
  "salary_range": "8.000.000 - 12.000.000",
  "location": "Jakarta Selatan",
  "type": "freelancer",
  "status": "published"
}
